x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: ACC telemetry is the continuous data feed that powers DEX AI diagnosis. Without active telemetry flow, DEX AI cannot perform real-time endpoint health analysis or proactive anomaly detection.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure the Agent Client Collector (ACC) is installed and running on endpoint devices. ACC is the telemetry collection mechanism that feeds DEX AI — without active data flow, all AI diagnosis capabilities are non-functional. Check ACC connectivity via the DEX workspace.
